name: Apache Tomcat 中间件基线 (CIS Benchmark + 等保 2.0)
description: Tomcat 9/10 安全配置基线. 参考 CIS Apache Tomcat 9 Benchmark.

rules.title: 禁用默认 tomcat-users.xml
rules.description: 默认 tomcat-users.xml 含 manager-gui 角色, 删除或禁用所有默认账号.

fix.suggestion: 清空 tomcat-users.xml 默认账号, 仅保留必要管理用户用强密码
fix.command: F=/opt/tomcat/conf/tomcat-users.xml; [ -f "$F" ] || exit 0; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp -p "$F" "$F.mxbak"; sed -i -E 's|^([[:space:]]*)(<user[^>]*password="(tomcat|admin|manager)"[^>]*/?>)|\1<!-- mxsec disabled: \2 -->|g' "$F"; grep -qE '^[[:space:]]*<user[^>]*password="(tomcat|admin|manager)"' "$F" && { cp -p "$F.mxbak" "$F"; exit 1; }; systemctl restart tomcat

rules.title: 删除 manager / host-manager / docs / examples
rules.description: 生产环境必须删除默认 webapp.

rules.title: 运行用户不应为 root
rules.description: tomcat 进程必须以非 root (tomcat 用户) 运行.

fix.suggestion: systemd 启动 service 加 User=tomcat; chown -R tomcat:tomcat /opt/tomcat

rules.title: 关闭 server 头版本号

fix.command: F=/opt/tomcat/conf/server.xml; [ -f "$F" ] || exit 1; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp -p "$F" "$F.mxbak"; grep -qE 'server=""|server="Apache"' "$F" || sed -i -E 's|(<Connector[[:space:]]+port="8080")([^>]*)|\1 server=""\2|' "$F"; grep -qE 'server=""|server="Apache"' "$F" && systemctl restart tomcat || { cp -p "$F.mxbak" "$F"; exit 1; }

rules.title: 自定义错误页
rules.description: 默认错误页暴露 Tomcat 版本, web.xml 配置 error-page.

fix.command: F=/opt/tomcat/conf/web.xml; [ -f "$F" ] || exit 1; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp -p "$F" "$F.mxbak"; grep -q '<error-page>' "$F" || sed -i 's|</web-app>|  <error-page><error-code>500</error-code><location>/error/500.html</location></error-page>\n</web-app>|' "$F"; grep -q '<error-page>' "$F" && systemctl restart tomcat || { cp -p "$F.mxbak" "$F"; exit 1; }

rules.title: 禁用 DefaultServlet listings
rules.description: web.xml DefaultServlet 的 listings 必须为 false.

param: F=/opt/tomcat/conf/web.xml; [ -f "$F" ] || { echo COMPLIANT; exit 0; }; perl -0ne 'exit(/<param-name>listings<\/param-name>\s*<param-value>true<\/param-value>/s ? 1 : 0)' "$F" && echo COMPLIANT || echo VULN

fix.command: F=/opt/tomcat/conf/web.xml; [ -f "$F" ] || exit 1; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp -p "$F" "$F.mxbak"; perl -0pi -e 's{(<param-name>listings</param-name>\s*<param-value>)true(</param-value>)}{${1}false${2}}gs' "$F"; ! grep -Pzo '<param-name>listings</param-name>\s*<param-value>true</param-value>' "$F" >/dev/null && systemctl restart tomcat || { cp -p "$F.mxbak" "$F"; exit 1; }

rules.title: 禁用 HTTP Connector 或仅作 redirect
rules.description: 生产应仅暴露 HTTPS Connector.

fix.suggestion: 8080 connector 加 redirectPort=8443 或注释掉, 仅保留 8443 SSL

fix.command: F=/opt/tomcat/conf/tomcat-users.xml; [ -f "$F" ] || exit 1; id tomcat >/dev/null 2>&1 && chown tomcat:tomcat "$F"; chmod 600 "$F"

rules.title: Shutdown 端口禁用
rules.description: 8005 默认 shutdown 端口必须改 -1 (禁用) 或绑定 127.0.0.1.

fix.command: F=/opt/tomcat/conf/server.xml; [ -f "$F" ] || exit 1; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp -p "$F" "$F.mxbak"; sed -i -E 's|(<Server[[:space:]]+port=")[0-9]+(")|\1-1\2|' "$F"; grep -qE '<Server[[:space:]]+port="-1"' "$F" && systemctl restart tomcat || { cp -p "$F.mxbak" "$F"; exit 1; }

F=/opt/tomcat/conf/server.xml; [ -f "$F" ] || exit 1; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp -p "$F" "$F.mxbak"; grep -q 'org.apache.catalina.valves.AccessLogValve' "$F" || sed -i '0,#</Host>#s##  <Valve className="org.apache.catalina.valves.AccessLogValve" directory="logs" prefix="localhost_access_log" suffix=".txt" pattern="common" />\n      </Host>#' "$F"; grep -q 'org.apache.catalina.valves.AccessLogValve' "$F" && systemctl restart tomcat || { cp -p "$F.mxbak" "$F"; exit 1; }

rules.title: JMX 远程默认不应开放
rules.description: JAVA_OPTS 不应含 -Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote 暴露公网.

param: F=/opt/tomcat/bin/setenv.sh; [ -f "$F" ] || { echo COMPLIANT; exit 0; }; if grep -E -- '-Dcom\.sun\.management\.jmxremote' "$F" | grep -q '\.port'; then grep -E -- '-Dcom\.sun\.management\.jmxremote' "$F" | grep -q 'authenticate=true' && echo COMPLIANT || echo EXPOSED; else echo COMPLIANT; fi

fix.suggestion: JMX 远程必加 -Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote.authenticate=true 与 ssl=true; 推荐仅本地访问
